name: StatusCake API
what_it_does: Multi-protocol uptime and performance monitoring service with REST API for HTTP, TCP, DNS, SMTP, PUSH and other check types. Includes SSL certificate monitoring, domain expiry checking, and page speed monitoring.
use_cases: Creating and managing uptime monitors across multiple protocols via REST API
SSL certificate expiry monitoring and alerting for automated renewal workflows
Page speed monitoring for performance regression detection in CI/CD
Domain expiry tracking and automated renewal notification workflows
Status page management for public incident communication
not_for: Complex synthetic transaction monitoring (multi-step browser tests)
Enterprise network intelligence (use ThousandEyes or Kentik)
best_when: An agent monitors many HTTP endpoints, SSL certificates, and domains with a free or low-cost tier and needs comprehensive alerting integration.
avoid_when: You need synthetic browser testing or complex transaction monitoring — use Checkly or Datadog Synthetics.

auth.notes: API token from StatusCake account. Bearer token in Authorization header. Single account-level token. OpenAPI spec published with full schema documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 10 uptime tests (5-minute interval), 1 status page, SSL monitoring
pricing.paid_tiers: Superior from $24.99/month; Business from $66.66/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Generous free tier with SSL and domain monitoring included. Paid plans unlock more tests, 1-minute intervals, and advanced features. Long-standing UK-based monitoring service.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAPI spec published. REST API v1 well-documented. Error responses are JSON with descriptive messages and field-level validation errors. SDK available for multiple languages.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Test creation by name can produce duplicates — check existing tests before creating. Test updates by ID are idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier 5-minute intervals may miss brief outages — paid plan needed for 1-minute checks
SSL monitoring is separate test type from uptime — must create separate SSL checks
Contact groups must be created before assigning to tests — pre-create alert contacts
Rate limit of 100 req/5min applies to management API — factor into bulk operations

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR compliant. TLS enforced. Single account-level token without scopes. EU data residency available. UK-based company with established security practices.
